memoryArtifacts.headline: Swaffer name originates Swatfield bridge Kent
memoryArtifacts.description: This interesting and unusual surname is of English origin, and is locational from a place called Swatfield Bridge in Willesborough, in Kent. The placename is of unknown origin, but the second element …

zh.lifeSummary: Josias Swaffer於大約1625年出生在英國肯特。他和Elizabeth Andra Morris至少有7個兒子和1個女兒。他於1660年在英國英格蘭肯特福爾可斯同被列為removed as jurat of the town of folkestone。他去世於1689年12月18日在英國爾享年65歲，埋葬在英國肯特福爾可斯同。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Josias Swaffer于大约1625年出生在英国肯特。他和Elizabeth Andra Morris至少有7个儿子和1个女儿。他于1660年在英国英格兰肯特福爾可斯同被列为removed as jurat of the town of folkestone。他去世于1689年12月18日在英国爾享年65岁，埋葬在英国肯特福爾可斯同。

nameMeanings.name: Swaffer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Swatfield Bridge in Willesborough (Kent). The placename derives from Old English swæth ‘track, pathway’ + ford ‘ford’.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: Josias Swaffer was born about 1625, in Kent, England. He had at least 7 sons and 1 daughter with Elizabeth Andra Morris. In 1660, at the age of 36, his occupation is listed as removed as jurat of the town of folkestone in Folkestone, Kent, England, United Kingdom. He died on 18 December 1689, in Cheshire, England, at the age of 65, and was buried in Folkestone, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Josias Swaffer est né environ 1625, à Kent, Angleterre. Il a eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille avec Elizabeth Andra Morris. En 1660, à l’âge de 36 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est removed as jurat of the town of folkestone à Folkestone, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 18 décembre 1689, à Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Folkestone, Kent, Angleterre.

de.Haverford Township, Delaware, Pennsylvan: Haverford Township, Delaware, Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten
de.lifeSummary: Josias Swaffer wurde um 1625 in Kent, England geboren. Er hatte mit Elizabeth Andra Morris mindestens 7 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1660, als er 36 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als removed as jurat of the town of folkestone in Folkestone, Kent, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 18. Dezember 1689 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Cheshire, England und wurde in Folkestone, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Josias Swaffer è nato il circa 1625 nel Kent, England. Lui avuto almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia con Elizabeth Andra Morris. Nel 1660, all'età di 36 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come removed as jurat of the town of folkestone nel Folkestone, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 18 dicembre 1689, nel Cheshire, England, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Folkestone, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Josias Swafferは約1625年にイギリスケントで生まれた。彼はElizabeth Andra Morrisとの間に少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。1660年，36歳の時，イギリスイギリスケントフォルケストーンでの職業はremoved as jurat of the town of folkestoneと記録されている。彼は1689年12月18日にイギリスチェシュアイアで65歳で死去し，イギリスケントフォルケストーンにて埋葬された。

ko.Haverford Township, Delaware, Pennsylvan: 미국 펜실베이니아 주 데로르 하버퍼드 타운시프
ko.lifeSummary: Josias Swaffer(은)는 대략 1625년 영국 켄트에서 태어났다. 그는 Elizabeth Andra Morris(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1660년, 36세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 폴케스톤에서 removed as jurat of the town of folkestone이었다. 그는 1689년 12월 18일 영국 체실르에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 폴케스톤에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Josias Swaffer nasceu aproximadamente 1625, em Kent, Inglaterra. Ele teve pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha com Elizabeth Andra Morris. Em 1660, com 36 anos, sua profissão aparece como removed as jurat of the town of folkestone em Folkestone, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 18 de dezembro de 1689, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Folkestone, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Josias Swaffer родился около 1625 г. в местности кэнт, Англия. У него было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь от Elizabeth Andra Morris. В 1660 году, в возрасте 36 лет,  он работал по профессии removed as jurat of the town of folkestone в местности фолкестоун, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 18 декабря 1689 г. в местности чешир, Англия в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности фолкестоун, кэнт, Англия.

En 1660, a la edad de 36 años, su ocupación registrada era removed as jurat of the town of folkestone en Folkestone, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 18 de diciembre de 1689, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Folkestone, Kent, Inglaterra.
